name: Astral-Zamazenta (Crown Aegis)
description: The crowned shield guardian clad in unbreakable star-forged metal. Its shield repels even the concentrated blast of a collapsing star.
originLore: Standing as an impenetrable wall between reality and chaos, Astral-Zamazenta's shield was tempered in the core of neutron stars.

lore.celestialConcordance: Astral-Zamazenta absorbs destructive impact forces and converts them into protective light fields for allied entities.

quantumResonators.name: Behemoth Bash (Astral)
quantumResonators.description: Charges forward with its star-shield, smashing through enemy defenses.

quantumResonators.name: Impenetrable Starlight
quantumResonators.description: Creates an absolute force field that immunizes all allies to status conditions and incoming attacks.
